revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note

revision.comment: EmmaBot moved page [[Category talk:6世紀日本の女性 (職業別)]] to [[Category talk:6th-century Japanese women (by occupation)]]: Bot: move untranslated category to English equivalent [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22534966935|commit triggered pipeline]]
